jobDescription: This is Adyen Speed is the foundation of our company. We think fast. We work fast. We launch fast. We put our merchants at the center of everything we do, and we never stop until the job is done. We’re creating our own path, with a global team driving sustainable growth. We don’t do hierarchy, egos or boundaries. “ Not possible” is not in our vocabulary — “freedom” is. This is who we are: honest, direct and always bringing an element of fun into our work. If you’re ready to join the power of fast, keep reading Business Analyst Adyen is looking for a Business Analyst in São Paulo to be a key player in one of our major strategic initiatives: turning data into cash. You will work closely with our Account Management team and clients to deliver insights from data. Additionally, you will be challenged to explore new business opportunities based on your analysis and approach complex problems in a structured manner, while converting the results of the analysis into a compelling and actionable story for internal or external stakeholders. What you’ll do Extract and analyse data to generate relevant business insights for commercial teams; Create and adapt views and dashboards to support commercial decisions and managing customers pro-actively; Evaluate data required to solve business problems, accommodating customer’s needs; Turn your findings into effective communication and concise, actionable advice by connecting the data to a story. Work in a high pace environment with the ability to quickly shift priorities and produce results on a consistent basis; Who you are Fluent in both Portuguese and English with written and verbal communication skills; Have excellent analytical and modelling skills, with proficiency in tools such Spark, R, Python, Postgre SQL; Have experience with Data Visualisation tools like Tableau, Looker, Power BI; Have the ability to interface seamlessly with a global, multicultural team; Have at least 2 years of experience in data analysis with commercial focus; Who we are Adyen is the payments platform of choice for the world's leading companies, delivering frictionless payments across online, mobile and in-store channels. It is the only provider of a modern end-to-end infrastructure, connecting directly to Visa, Mastercard, and consumers' globally preferred payment methods. With offices around the world, Adyen serves nine of the 10 largest U. S. internet companies and many worldwide retailers. Customers include Facebook, Uber, L' Oreal, Casper, Bonobos and Spotify.
